'''Thikkiiana City''' was a [[Wookiee]] [[city]] located on their [[homeworld]] of [[Kashyyyk]]. Acting as the technological hub of the [[planet]], it was of equal standing to [[Kachirho]], the center of all [[hyperspace]] mapping.<ref name="BMF 43" /> By the [[Imperial Era|time]] of the [[Galactic Empire]], it featured a [[spaceport]].<ref name="Smuggler's Guide" />

{{City-stub}}
